items: Redesigned the UI to reduce the amount of dead space.
Chat alerts like subscriptions, raids, and announcements have been redesigned.
Playback controls are now always visible even with the queue collapsed.
Increased the max number of messages displayed to 300, as well as added a setting to change it.
The settings dialog now works better on smaller screens.
Added setting to control scale of the live chat.
Added full support for all Twitch badges, even channel-specific ones.
Added ability to install Chatvoice as an app.
Switched to Patreon instead of StreamElements for donations.
Added OwO+ badges for Patreon members.
Badges and emotes now have tooltips when hovered.
Added ?channel= URL parameter to open and connect to a Twitch channel automatically.
Added the ability to quickly add and swap between channels.
Added ability to resize and collapse the chat and queue panels.
Changed queue actions (play/pause, etc.)to be more prominent.
Added third party emote support from BetterTTV, FrankerFaceZ, and 7TV.
Added setting to remove emotes from messages added to the queue.
Added display of system messages like connection status and subscriber alerts.
Added the ability to quickly scroll back to new messages when scrolled.
Added ability to filter out mentions from speech.
Added different timestamp formats for the chat preview.
Added clickable URL links in the chat preview.
Changed the TTS indicator in the chat preview to an icon instead of 'TTS'.
Bug fix: chat and queue not resetting when changing channels.
Bug fix: large messages causing scroll issues.
Added this very changelog dialog so you can see what's been added each update!
Toasts now appear at the top-center of the screen instead of the bottom-right.
Bug fix: settings being reset when an input field is empty.
Bug fix: chat messages causing dropdown menus to scroll back to default position.
Initial public release of Chatvoice.
